events.body: Running status against the dbt project. Project parses clean — 87 models, 280 tests, last refresh 04:00 CST.
Running search against the project for 'phantom out-of-stock', 'store cluster', 'promotion overlap', 'shelf compliance'. Four upstream models surface.
events.side_effect: tool:search matched stg_retailer_pos_hourly, int_shelf_compliance_daily, stg_promotion_calendar, dim_store_cluster

events.body: Running describe on each candidate. POS is hourly grain on store · sku · event_date. Shelf compliance rolls to daily. Promo calendar is keyed on promo · store · date. Store cluster dim is SCD-2.
events.side_effect: tool:describe returned grain=hourly+store+sku, grain=daily+store+sku, grain=promo+store+date, grain=store+cluster_key

events.body: Running lineage. Join path is clean: POS and shelf compliance both key on store · sku · event_date. Cluster dim attaches via store_id. Promo attaches via store_id and event_date. Gap is at the aggregation layer — no model rolls phantom-OOS counts to (region, promotion_overlap_bucket).
events.side_effect: tool:lineage validated join path · gap confirmed at aggregation grain

events.body: Spinning up a small warehouse and running dbt_show on a 7-day slice across MegaMart Atlanta DMA. Phantom-OOS signal at store · sku · day fires on 4.2 percent of slot-days. Cluster aggregation looks viable.
events.side_effect: tool:warehouse start XS · tool:dbt_show 7-day slice · 4.2% slot-day phantom rate

events.body: Authoring models/gold/phantom_oos_by_cluster.sql. Writing the config block first — table materialization, gold schema, tags supply_chain and ai_built.
Writing the header docblock so downstream readers know what this model is and who built it.
events.code_append:
-- gold.phantom_oos_by_cluster
-- Phantom out-of-stock detection rolled up to store cluster
-- Cluster = (region, promotion_overlap_bucket)
-- Built live by dbt-wizard sub-agents in response to CSCO Q3 S&OP prep
-- Sources: stg_retailer_pos_hourly + int_shelf_compliance_daily +
--          stg_promotion_calendar + dim_store_cluster

events.body: Anchoring the POS CTE on the trailing 90-day window — that is the exact horizon the CSCO asked for.
Pulling shelf compliance, cluster master, and active promo into their own CTEs. Promo filters to ACTIVE only so we get a clean overlap signal.
Deriving the phantom-OOS boolean. Shelf says product should be on shelf AND POS velocity collapsed at least 50 percent — that is a phantom out-of-stock.
events.code_append:
phantom_signal as (
    select
        s.store_id,
        s.sku_id,
        s.event_date,
        case
            when s.shelf_should_have_stock = true
             and p.unit_velocity_pct_change <= -0.5
            then 1
            else 0
        end as is_phantom_oos
    from shelf s
    left join pos p
        on  p.store_id = s.store_id
        and p.sku_id = s.sku_id
        and p.event_date = s.event_date
)

events.body: Final SELECT — one row per (region, promotion_overlap_bucket). Stores affected, event count, rate, and last-fired timestamp. Ordered by rate so the chronic offenders sit at the top of the table.
events.code_append:
select
    c.region,
    case
        when pr.promo_id is not null then 'ON_PROMO'
        else 'NO_PROMO'
    end as promotion_overlap_bucket,
    count(distinct ps.store_id) as stores_affected_90d,
    sum(ps.is_phantom_oos) as phantom_oos_events_90d,
    sum(ps.is_phantom_oos) / nullif(count(*), 0) as phantom_oos_rate,
    max(ps.event_date) as last_phantom_oos_at
from phantom_signal ps
join cluster c on c.store_id = ps.store_id
left join promo pr on pr.store_id = ps.store_id and pr.event_date = ps.event_date
where ps.is_phantom_oos = 1
group by 1, 2
order by phantom_oos_rate desc

events.body: Writing the YAML companion. Description first, then the schema contract — every column gets a type so downstream Cortex agents can resolve it without ambiguity.
events.code_append:
version: 2

models:
  - name: phantom_oos_by_cluster
    description: |
      Phantom out-of-stock counts and rates rolled up to (region,
      promotion_overlap_bucket) over the trailing 90 days. Built by
      dbt-wizard sub-agents on 2026-05-21 in response to CSCO S&OP prep.
    config:
      contract:
        enforced: true
      tags: [supply_chain, ai_built]
      meta:
        owner: supply_chain_analytics
        built_by: dbt-wizard
        consumes: [stg_retailer_pos_hourly, int_shelf_compliance_daily, stg_promotion_calendar, dim_store_cluster]

events.body: Adding the column-level tests. Uniqueness on the cluster key (region, promotion_overlap_bucket). Not-null on the rate. Accepted-values on the bucket so nothing drifts.
events.code_append:
columns:
      - name: region
        data_type: varchar
        tests:
          - not_null
      - name: promotion_overlap_bucket
        data_type: varchar
        tests:
          - not_null
          - accepted_values:
              values: ['ON_PROMO', 'NO_PROMO']
      - name: stores_affected_90d
        data_type: number
        tests:
          - not_null
      - name: phantom_oos_events_90d
        data_type: number
      - name: phantom_oos_rate
        data_type: number
        tests:
          - not_null
      - name: last_phantom_oos_at
        data_type: date

    tests:
      - dbt_utils.unique_combination_of_columns:
          combination_of_columns: [region, promotion_overlap_bucket]

events.body: Running dbt_show on the compiled model against the same 7-day slice Worker used. Tests resolve clean. Schema contract enforces.
Materializing gold.phantom_oos_by_cluster to Iceberg on S3 via the Snowflake dbt adapter. Writing manifest, snapshotting, registering with the Open Catalog.
Running lineage one more time. Four upstreams attached. Cortex agents in the Crisis Room can now resolve the new gold table on their next pass. The S&OP question has an asset behind it.
events.side_effect: tool:lineage updated · downstream:cortex_agents notified · 87 models → 88 models
